did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses terahertz scanning reflectometry, terahertz 3D imaging, and terahertz time-domain spectroscopy to identify features in skin biopsy samples. While it mentions that another system (MelaFind) uses pattern-recognition, this paper itself relies on physical imaging and spectral profiling techniques without employing AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods for its own results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
